items.headline_en: vLLM release feed now shows v0.20.0: [CI] Automate Docker Hub release image publishing (#40415)
items.summary_en: The monitored release feed for vLLM changed and the newest visible tag is v0.20.0: [CI] Automate Docker Hub release image publishing (#40415). The feed timestamp is 2026-04-22T23:15:59Z. This looks like a release-level update rather than a cosmeti...
items.evidence_excerpt: title=v0.20.0: [DSV4] Add silu clamp limit to shared expert (#40950) updated=2026-04-27T07:40:46Z link=https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/releases/tag/v0.20.0 summary= content=Signed-off-by: Yongye Zhu zyy1102000@gmail.com (cherry picked from commit 706a04d )
diff_excerpt: +title=v0.20.0: [DSV4] Add silu clamp limit to shared expert (#40950)
+content=Signed-off-by: Yongye Zhu zyy1102000@gmail.com (cherry picked from commit 706a04d )

content=This is a patch release on top of v0.18.0 to address a few issues: Change default SM100 MLA prefill backend back to TRT-LLM ( #38562 ) Fix mock.patch resolution failure for standalone_compile.FakeTensorMode on Python <= 3.10 ( #37158 ) Disable monolithic TRTLLM MoE for Renormalize routing #37605 Pre-download missing FlashInfer headers in Docker build #38391 Fix DeepGemm E8M0 accuracy degradation for Qwen3.5 FP8 on Blackwell ( #38083 )

items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Introducing Gpt 5 5".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=Introducing GPT-5.5 published=Thu, 23 Apr 2026 11:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-5 description=Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools. title=Plugins and skills title=Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API published=Wed, 22 Apr 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/speeding-up-agentic-workflows-with-websockets description=A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.
